But basically, we're a little bit different from a lot of link building agencies in that we only work in the B2B SaaS space.
So we don't take on any project.
We're pretty particular about the projects that we work with because we want to make sure that we can actually add value to the project and be successful.

So that's something that we don't do.
And one of the ways that we go about doing that to be different is that we do fresh outreach for every project that we take on.
So as soon as we say, okay, we've vetted this project, yeah, this is something we can work with, we immediately start looking at their competition.
Where's the competition linking that they're not?
